prompt: A segmentation mask of a person standing, with precise labels for head, torso, arms, legs, hands, and feet. Background should be labeled separately.
prompt_refined: Generate a clear segmentation mask image of a full-body person standing upright. Each distinct body part – head, torso, arms, legs, hands, and feet – must be accurately segmented and represented by a unique, solid color. The background should be segmented separately and depicted as another unique, solid color, distinct from all body parts.
